name: chitragupta-monorepo
description: The Autonomous AI Agent Platform — 17-package TypeScript monorepo with zero-LLM cognitive layer, GraphRAG memory, bi-temporal knowledge graph, centralized daemon, and self-evolving skills

scripts.clean:all: find packages -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf node_modules && find packages -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf dist
scripts.nuke: find packages -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find packages -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete ; rm -rf node_modules dist ; echo 'chitragupta: nuked dist + node_modules + tsbuildinfo'
scripts.build:bundle: pnpm run build && node scripts/bundle.mjs && node scripts/build-types.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "core,swara,anina,smriti,ui,yantra,dharma,netra,prana,sutra,cli" "cd packages/core && npm run dev" "cd packages/swara && npm run dev" "cd packages/anina && npm run dev" "cd packages/smriti && npm run dev" "cd packages/ui && npm run dev" "cd packages/yantra && npm run dev" "cd packages/dharma && npm run dev" "cd packages/netra && npm run dev" "cd packages/prana && npm run dev" "cd packages/sutra && npm run dev" "cd packages/cli && npm run dev"
scripts.daemon: pnpm --filter @chitragupta/daemon build && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts daemon start
